## Hard Gates Summary (Never Bypass)

| Action | Gate Status |
|--------|-------------|
| WhatsApp live customer outbound | BLOCKED |
| Gmail live auto-send | BLOCKED |
| Moyasar live charge | BLOCKED |
| LinkedIn automation | BLOCKED |
| Scraping | BLOCKED |
| Cold WhatsApp | BLOCKED |
| Fake proof / fake revenue | BLOCKED |

## Action Modes
- `suggest_only` — AI drafts, founder approves & acts
- `draft_only` — writes to draft queue, no external action
- `approval_required` — requires explicit founder click/confirmation
- `approved_manual` — founder has pre-approved this action class
- `blocked` — hard block, cannot be enabled without code change + founder approval

See `docs/wave8/integration_registry.yaml` for per-integration setup steps (Arabic + English), required env vars, fallback behavior, and blocked action lists.
